title: Memecylon urceolatum
taxonomy: Memecylon urceolatum belongs to the family Melastomataceae. This family comprises a large number of plant species commonly known as the melastome or memecylon family. The genus Memecylon is native to tropical and subtropical regions and contains around 300 species. The plant classification for Memecylon urceolatum further categorizes it as a species within this genus. Its classification is a part of the larger plant taxonomy, which helps in understanding and identifying various plant species.
uses: Memecylon urceolatum is known to have various medicinal uses in traditional medicine. The plant's extracts have been reported to exhibit antimicrobial and antioxidant properties. It is also used to treat various health issues, including fever, skin infections, and respiratory problems. In some regions, the plant is used to treat gastrointestinal disorders and as an anti-inflammatory agent. Further research is needed to confirm the plant's efficacy and potential side effects for these uses.

The plant is known for its various health benefits, including anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant properties, which have been used to treat various ailments such as fever, digestive issues, and respiratory problems.
